steps.title: Factor out the common multiple
steps.content: The target expression $70x + 50$ is exactly 10 times the given expression $7x + 5$: $$70x + 50 = 10(7x + 5)$$

steps.title: Substitute and simplify
steps.content: We're given that $7x + 5 = 47$, so substitute this value: $$70x + 50 = 10(7x + 5) = 10(47) = 470$$ That matches choice D — D is correct.
